title: One shared compaction module: log, counts, sweep, warning, anchor predicate
action: Per D3/D4/D5/D9/D10/D12/D13/D17/D20. Create skills/bee-hive/templates/lib/compaction.mjs — the single domain module both hooks and CLI verbs call. Exports: (1) appendCompactionRecord(root, {event, sessionId}) writing .bee/logs/compaction.jsonl via fsutil's appendJsonl (it calls ensureDir; a bare fs.appendFileSync would throw ENOENT if .bee/logs/ were missing), wrapped in a LOCAL try/catch so a write failure never changes any caller's return value or exit code (precedent hooks/bee-model-guard.mjs:106-128). Record shape per D5: {ts, event, session, lane, feature, phase, cell, compact_index, cell_compact_count, anchor_present}. Resolve lane/feature/phase through resolvePipeline(root, {sessionId}) — WITH the session id, exactly as inject.mjs:301-305 and :477-479 both do — so a lane-bound session logs its own lane, not the default state.json. ONLY precompact records are counted and only a precompact counts itself: on precompact both counts are prior-precompact-records + 1; on resume both carry the plain prior count, never +1 again. (2) readCompactionCounts(root, {sessionId, cell}). (3) survivalWarning(count) -> the D9 advisory string when cell_compact_count >= 2, else null. (4) anchorMissing(root, {sessionId}) per D10: resolved phase non-terminal (terminal set idle | compounding-complete, state.mjs:1655) AND (a cell claimed by this session OR approved_gates.execution true) AND readIntent returns null; returns the exact command to run. (5) compactCheck(root, {sessionId}) per D12, read-only: session record exists and stored id matches; lane binding resolves with LANE_INVALID/LANE_MISSING/LANE_CORRUPT SURFACED not swallowed; claimed cells still claimed and owned by this session; execution gate still true whenever a cell is claimed; the claimed cell's deps still capped; this session's reservations still held, with session-less rows (reservations.mjs:92-98) reported 'unbound' and never a mismatch; an anchor exists. THEN, per D20, in this same cell: copy to .bee/bin/lib/compaction.mjs, run `node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --write`, and run `node skills/bee-hive/scripts/onboard_bee.mjs --repo-root . --apply` so the ledger records the new file. Adding a lib file turns release_manifest --check and ledger_parity --check red repo-wide until both run — that is PAT37's recorded root cause and this cell owns it, not a later one. Author scripts/test_compaction_module.mjs: two full compaction cycles asserting the D9 threshold fires on the SECOND not the first; a read-only .bee/logs/ case asserting the caller's exit code is unchanged; a lane-bound session asserting the record carries the lane's feature/phase; a corrupt lane record asserting the typed code is surfaced; and an idempotence case hashing the .bee/ tree before and after two compactCheck runs to prove it mutated nothing.

truths: A resume record never re-increments the counts — one compaction reads as one, not two.
compactCheck leaves the .bee/ tree hash-identical across two consecutive runs; the proof is the hash, not the stdout.
A corrupt lane record surfaces its typed LANE_* code rather than falling back silently.
A failed log append leaves the caller's return value and exit code unchanged.
`node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check` and `node scripts/ledger_parity.mjs --check` are both green at cap time — the shared baseline is never left red for the next cell.
artifacts: a regenerated release manifest and onboarding hash ledger
prohibitions: Never edit .bee/bin/lib/ as the source — it is a mirror of skills/bee-hive/templates/lib/ (D17).
The sweep never repairs, never releases a claim or reservation, never blocks.
Do not add log rotation or a size cap — no existing .bee/logs/ file has one.
Do not defer the manifest or ledger regen to a later cell.

verify: node scripts/test_compaction_module.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check && node scripts/ledger_parity.mjs --check

trace.dropped_reason: Revision 2 failed validation (6 CRITICAL). Superseded by revision 3 under D23-D26: widened regen trigger, PreCompact row split, four-way count vocabulary, corrected handoffOutcome premise.
